revision_summary:
Four targeted fixes required before Stage 3 is production-ready:

1. CORRECT the multi_touch_patterns[0].stewart_read claim that 'the son's title status was never confirmed.' It WAS confirmed at 01:48–01:54 when Parker explicitly asked about co-owners and Barbara named her son. Revise to: the son's title status was confirmed, but his name, contact info, and availability were never captured — a different and more precise gap.

2. CORRECT the schema reference in multi_touch_patterns[0] and cherry_pick_moments[4]: the applicable protocol is protocols.adult_child_decision_maker, not protocols.spouse_decision. The son is an adult child co-owner, not a spouse — the schema has a distinct section for exactly this scenario.

3. ADD the missing roof age gap as a cherry_pick moment or handoff brief item: Parker asks about roof type (asphalt shingle confirmed) but never asks about roof age. The schema verify.roof_type_age requires both, with a hard DQ flag for roofs over 15 years. This is an unresolved qualifier that belongs in unresolved_concerns.

4. REVISE the bill-collection pivot characterization at 03:55 in rep_intent.evidence[2] and cherry_pick_moments[2]: the pivot away from bill collection is partially defensible given Barbara's ~3-month residency (no bill history exists to read back). The coaching failure is the absence of a handoff bridge to the closer ('specialist will collect the bill Monday'), not the pivot decision itself. Reframe accordingly. Also correct the cherry_pick_moments[2] anchor quote — '03:48 Yeah.' is Barbara confirming the timeline, not the bill anchor moment; the bill exchange spans 03:02–03:55 and the coaching moment is better anchored at 03:55 when Parker pivots.

Optional but recommended: add the intro deviation (00:29 — Parker uses neither the tesla nor standard schema intro variant) as a cherry_pick moment, and note the positive credit-threshold compliance (670 stated correctly, unlike SESSION18_fcbf33c1). Neither is blocking but both add analytical completeness.
